name: Taste Gourmet Group Limited
summary: Taste Gourmet Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates restaurants in Hong Kong. The company operates 30 restaurants under the La'taste, Nabe Urawa, Dab-Pa, Say Cheese, Sweetology, Urawa, Sweetology Takano Ramen, Tirpse, and Rakuraku Ramen, Parkview, The Pho, and Madam Saigon brands. It offers Vietnamese, Japanese, Chinese, and Western cuisines. The company also provides management services. It serves customers in mid-to-high-end market segment. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. Taste Gourmet Group Limited is a subsidiary of IKEAB Limited.
